question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper discusses the collection and analysis of HIV sequences from patient samples. It mentions that blood samples were collected from 305 ART-naive persons diagnosed with HIV/AIDS in Bulgaria, and these samples were used for sequence analysis.
sentences: "Blood samples were collected from 305 ART-naive persons out of 1446 patients diagnosed with HIV/AIDS in Bulgaria between 1998 and 2011 at the National HIV Reference Laboratory and/or in the clinics responsible for the management of patients with HIV in Sofia, Plovdiv and Varna." "Plasma viral RNA was extracted using the MagCor Nucleic Acid Extraction Kit (RBC Bioscience, Taiwan)."

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility testing. It focuses on the prevalence of transmitted drug resistance mutations (TDRMs) and genetic diversity of HIV-1 in patient samples.
sentences: "The prevalence of TDR and HIV-1 subtypes was determined in 305/1446 (21.1%) persons newly diagnosed with HIV/AIDS from 1988 to 2011. TDR mutations (TDRMs) in protease and reverse transcriptase were defined using the WHO HIV drug mutation list."

question: Does the paper report GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates? If "Yes", what were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper lists the GenBank accession numbers for the sequenced HIV isolates in the "GenBank accession numbers" section.

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper specifically mentions the study of HIV-1 genetic diversity and transmitted drug resistance mutations (TDRMs) in Bulgaria.
sentences: "To determine transmitted drug resistance (TDR) and HIV-1 genetic diversity in Bulgaria." "Phylogenetic analysis was used to infer polymerase (pol) genotype."

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
explain: The paper mentions that sequences of the protease and reverse transcriptase regions of the HIV-1 pol gene were generated and analyzed.
sentences: "Protease and reverse transcriptase sequences of the HIV-1 pol gene were generated using the TruGene DNA Sequencing System (Siemens Healthcare, USA) following the manufacturer's protocol." "HIV-1 drug resistance mutations were determined according to the WHO 2009 Surveillance Drug Resistance Mutations (SDRM) list."
